title: Trigger Sit
description: Sit anywhere in Minecraft with a simple command or keybind! Or simply sit by right clicking on stairs and slabs.
body:
# 🪑 TriggerSit
With this mod, you can sit down simply by pressing (Default) J or using the /trigger sit command. You can also sit on slabs and stairs by pressing right click!
# ✨ Features
- Can be triggered with a configurable keybind (Default: J) accessible via the Controls menu
- Or use /trigger sit
- Sit anywhere you want
- Enhances roleplay and comfort experiences
- Works in Survival without cheats enabled!
- Sit with right click on slabs and stairs!

**Please give me feedback [here](https://lostgpu.netlify.app/feedback).**
